channel.title: Follow Builders — X/Twitter
channel.description: AI builders' latest tweets, curated by follow-builders

item.title: Swyx (@swyx): sarah achieves the most impossible developer events - she got a bunch of developers at a writers mee...
item.description:
sarah achieves the most impossible developer events - she got a bunch of developers at a writers meetup to sit together….
… and actually write 🤯
thanks to @byAnhtho for being our 3rd Writing Mentor!
@allenpark helped with AV and will upload both her and @QuinnyPig video soon
Bio: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.
affiliations: - @dxtipshq - @cognition - @temporalio - @aidotengineer - @latentspacepod ❤️ 22 🔁 0

item.title: Swyx (@swyx): wow. @Microsoft just appointed a CVP whose entire job is OpenClaw. https://t.co/BpQeniIiVo https://t...
item.description:
wow. @Microsoft just appointed a CVP whose entire job is OpenClaw. https://t.co/BpQeniIiVo https://t.co/5BzGvkfvVD
Bio: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.
affiliations: - @dxtipshq - @cognition - @temporalio - @aidotengineer - @latentspacepod ❤️ 144 🔁 10

item.title: Garry Tan (@garrytan): If you can make the agents do magic for you and you have taste and agency, then you could be 16, 20,...
item.description:
If you can make the agents do magic for you and you have taste and agency, then you could be 16, 20, 30, or 45 or 60 and it doesn't matter
Bio: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop ❤️ 52 🔁 1

item.title: Peter Steinberger (@steipete): this just became more relevant 🙃 https://t.co/s2Z0P8Mo09
item.description:
this just became more relevant 🙃 https://t.co/s2Z0P8Mo09
Bio: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world @openclaw🦞 ❤️ 1262 🔁 65
